item.title: Impact of Environmental Allergens on Asthma Varies With Age
item.description: Older adults may be more vulnerable to asthma, study suggests. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Diabetes and Mental Health Care Gaps Exposed
item.description: A national investigation has found that gaps between diabetes and mental health services are exposing insulin-treated adults to avoidable harm and dea...

item.title: How Has Cardiac Anesthesiologist Pay Changed Over Time?
item.description: Nominal pay for US cardiac anesthesiologists rises from 2020 to 2024, but inflation-adjusted income remains unchanged and payment satisfaction falls, ...

item.title: Shingles Vaccine Coverage Falls Short
item.description: Fewer than half of eligible adults have had the NHS shingles jab, with health leaders urging millions to book their vaccine. Press Association

item.title: Resuscitation’s Ethical Dilemma: Rethink Epinephrine Use
item.description: Epinephrine improves ROSC in cardiac arrest but does not increase favorable neurologic recovery, raising ethical and guideline questions for clinician...
